source_record_details.conditions: Other species also deliberately inoculated (but only one organism counted here), With the indigenous flora in the environment (but not counted), Vacuum-packed
source_record_details.citation: Porto (et al.), 2002: Viability of a five-strain mixture of L. monocytogenes in vacuum-sealed packages of Frankfurters, commercially prepared with and without 2.0 or 3.0% added potassium lactate, during extended storage at 4 and 10 C. J.Food Prot. 65:308

construction_notes: elicited_inputs derived from ComBase record_id 30398 (Sausage / Frankfurter). N0 = log_cfu at lowest step. Curve spans the full 100-step / 1500h grid with every step either a real observation or linear interpolation between two real readings -- no gp_posterior fill, no padding past the experiment's end. past/future_temperature_segments are an approximate human-readable split of the curve's duration (constant temperature); ground_truth_curve.values is the actual gridded trajectory. Not a generalization claim -- used to sanity-check the elicit -> infer -> verdict pipeline end to end.
